title: Visas, status and immigration data: Q4 2024
body: "Citizenship data has been moved to “passport, citizenship and civil registration”.  This document contains details on:   number of applications received and input, or applications that are submitted online, for each route number of sponsorship requests and renewals percentage of applications, for each route, processed within service standards migration work-in-progress tests taken in relation to applications cost of each decision for all migrant applications (in country and overseas)  "
